eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 11:03 AM ON MAR 25, 2026 Effective until 07:03 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
A SAFE Alert has been issued for Gilbert, Arizona. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Gilbert Police Department is looking for 69-year-old Francisco Orozco. Francisco is described as 6 feet one inch tall, 200 pounds with grey hair and brown eyes. He was last seen on March 24, 2026, at 2200 hours, near Ocotillo Road and Val Vista Drive in Gilbert, AZ. Francisco is believed to be wearing a camo baseball hat. Francisco suffers from a medical condition(s) and may become disoriented or easily confused. Francisco does not have a cell phone with him.

If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
